title: Staying the Course
content: You watch the man disappear into the crowd. Something about his nervous twitch felt practiced, like an actor playing a part. Vane might have had his demons, but he was a professional. This drug story feels too perfectly timed to derail your investigation into the Atlas Foundation.||You shred the grainy photo and toss it into a bin. You have Julian Sterling's trail to follow, and you won't let a 'Rat' in an alleyway distract you from the bigger picture.||You return to your office to prepare for the confrontation with the elite at Atlas.
